articles.author: Staff Writer
articles.title: China's Xiaomi, Oppo, Vivo cut 2026 smartphone targets again: sources - Nikkei Asia
articles.description: Rising costs and component shortages lead some brands to slash outlook by up to 30%
articles.content: TAIPEI -- Major Chinese smartphone makers including Xiaomi, Oppo and Vivo have told suppliers they will again cut shipment targets for this year -- some by up to 30% -- as rising costs and unpreceden… [+120 chars]
